_comment: Astra Tarot Bot Egg for Pterodactyl Panel
name: Astra Tarot Bot
author: mystiatech@fullmooncyberworks.com
description: Discord tarot reading bot with dynamic themes

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Astra Installation Script for Pterodactyl

cd /home/container

# Clone repository if not present
if [ ! -d ".git" ]; then
    echo "Cloning Astra repository..."
    git clone {{REPO_URL}} . --depth 1
else
    echo "Repository exists, skipping clone"
fi

# Install dependencies if pyproject.toml exists
if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
    echo "Installing dependencies..."
    pip install --user --no-cache-dir -e .
else
    echo "pyproject.toml not found, skipping pip install"
fi

# Create necessary directories
mkdir -p data themes

echo "Installation complete!"

variables.name: Discord Token
variables.description: Your Discord bot token from the Developer Portal
